title: 理事長秘書のたづなさん

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Nice work, Trainer! It seems like you're giving it
your all every day!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Not only has your trainee grown remarkably, but,
as someone who's known you since you first came
to the academy...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm very happy to say that your own growth has
also been quite remarkable! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I may just be the director's secretary, but I hope
you'll allow me to keep watching over you from
here on out as well.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm truly looking forward to seeing what you do in
the future!
